name: EscrowContract

methods.name: configure
methods.desc: One-time admin config (creator only). Sets default USDC ASA ID.

methods.name: opt_in_asset
methods.desc: Opt the app into an ASA (required before receiving USDC). Creator only.

methods.name: create_escrow
methods.desc:
Create a new escrow. Must be grouped with a Payment (ALGO) to the app.
For USDC, a separate create_escrow_usdc method is used.

methods.name: create_escrow_usdc
methods.desc: Create escrow funded with USDC-A (ASA transfer).

methods.name: accept_task
methods.desc: Freelancer accepts the task. OPEN → ACCEPTED.

methods.name: reject_work
methods.desc: Client rejects submitted work. SUBMITTED → REFUNDED (immediate refund).

methods.name: release_payment
methods.desc: Release funds to freelancer. APPROVED → RELEASED.

methods.name: refund
methods.desc: Refund to client. Allowed if deadline passed or status is OPEN/ACCEPTED/SUBMITTED.

methods.name: get_status
methods.desc: Returns the numeric status of an escrow.

desc: ARC-4 multi-escrow contract using BoxMap keyed by task_id.
